INFOTRANSLATION: <p>Soo jeedimaha waxaa loo tixgalin doonaa inay qalmi yihiin haddii ay buuxiyaan shuruudaha soo socda:</p><ol><li><p>Ku habboon <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="http://peoplepowered.org/about"><u>People Powered’s </u><strong><u>hadafka iyo qiyamka</u></strong></a></p></li><li><p>Wax ku biiriya yoolalka People Powered <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Ha6-zibY5SWfJybAKzxPszHJnxpiphbX/view?usp=drive_link"><strong><u>qorshaha istaraatiijiga ah</u></strong></a></p></li><li><p>Faa'iido u leh bulshada People Powered ee <strong>caalamiga ah</strong> </p></li><li><p>Nagu dhaqaajinaya <strong>mustaqbalka fog</strong> ee dimuqraadiyadda ka qaybgalka, iyada oo la wajahayo caqabadaha iyo fursadaha istaraatiijiga ee mustaqbalka dheer</p></li><li><p>Lagu fulin karo 2026</p></li><li><p>Aan ka badneyn $25,000 USD</p></li></ol><p></p>
PPDESCRIPTION: Waxaan maalgelinnaa soo jeedimaha codadka ugu badan oo ku jira xadka miisaaniyadeenna. Haddii, ka dib markii mashruucyada sare la maalgeliyo, lacagta haray aysan ku filneyn inay maalgeliso mashruuca xiga ee codadka ugu badan, ama haddii la siman yahay, Gudiga Maamulku wuxuu go'aaminayaa in suurtagal tahay in si qayb ah loo fuliyo mashruuca/mashruucyada xiga ee lacagta la heli karo, ama in la doorto mid ka mid ah mashruucyada oo ku salaysan qiyamka People Powered (isu-dhaafitaanka, iskaashiga, xal-raadinta, sinnaanta iyo barashada), ama in lacagta haray la kaydiyo sanduuq kayd ah, ilaa lacag ku filan la helo.
COWOPHEADER: La wadaag fikradahaaga ee sida loo taageero iskaashiga shaqaalaha iska leh ee MA
COWOPSUBHEADER: Iskaashiga shaqaalaha iska leh ee MA, iyo iskaashi ay hogaaminayaan iskaashiyada shaqaalaha iska leh, waxaa loo casuumayaa inay la wadaagaan fikrad September 20 ilaa October 1, 2025, sida loo isticmaalo qayb ka mid ah lacagtan si macno leh. Waxaan ku dhiirrigelinaynaa inaad fikradahaaga la shaqeyso dadka kale, iyadoo la xasuusinayo in fikraddaadu aanu u baahnayn inay dheer tahay, ama inay si buuxda u horumarisay. Marxaladdaan, waxaan raadinaynaa fikrado aan si wadajir ah u horumarinno soo jeedimo buuxda.
COWOPRESULTSABOUT: <p>Ka dib wadatashi taxadar leh iyo wareeysiyo dhammaan kooxaha soo jeedinta, COWOP waxay si sharaf leh u shaacisay mashruucyada ugu dambeeya ee laga maalgelayo habka miisaaniyadda hoose-sare! Koox <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Vut_98L7WK2G9lJfF2fX2GG_gWQYpNpmnNRJLgAJUL4/edit?tab=t.jc1uksmlpuqv">khabiir ah</a> ayaa dib u eegay 17 soo jeedin oo dhan iyaga oo raacaya <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1REwc6lk0ZC6CWfUjEbNVkDWZIG9j0-gZbLls5XsGu4k/edit">heerka maalgelinta</a> waxayna go'aansadeen inay maalgeliyaan sagaal, badankooda oo dhow lacagta buuxda ee la codsaday. Hambalyo dhammaan intii ka qaybgashay, oo diyaariyay habka loo qoondeeyo $100,000-keenna haray sanadka soo socda!</p>
COWOPRESULTSHEADER: Gudiga Kormeerka Lacagta COWOP wuxuu go'aano ka gaaray qoondaynta $100,000-keenna ugu horreeya!
HORIZONRESULTSABOUT: <p>Wax badan ka baro habka iyo sida go'aamada loo gaaray <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1umMJylcpBaMtT2OLnO4THaj2aPzJqyz_g73Wi2VCyLQ/edit?slide=id.g355b90e2c0a_0_0#slide=id.g355b90e2c0a_0_0">halkan </a> </p>

Akhri soo jeedimaha hoose iyo buugga codaynta, waxaadna sidoo kale eegi kartaa qoraallada buuxa iyo doodaha adigoo gujinaya soo jeedin kasta. Soo jeedimaha la doorto waxaa la fulin doonaa 2026.
